title: Reader Core Command Protocol
description: JSON message protocol for platform → Core commands.

requestId.description: Unique positive request identifier for correlation. Value 0 is reserved for process-level errors emitted outside a host command.

method.description: Command method name, dot-separated. Must contain two or more non-empty tokens and no whitespace.

EmptyParams.description: Parameters for no-argument control commands. Must be an empty object.

result.description: Host capability result payload. For http.execute remote-reading continuations, see #/$defs/HostHttpResponse.

HostHttpResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability http.execute.

body.description: HTTP response body consumed by Core remote-reading rules.

status.description: Optional HTTP status code accepted by Core for diagnostics.

headers.description: Optional HTTP response headers accepted by Core for diagnostics.

finalUrl.description: Final URL observed by the host after redirect handling. Diagnostic in V1.

charsetHint.description: Optional host-observed charset hint. Core owns final decoding policy.

bodyBase64.description: Optional raw response body bytes encoded as Base64. V1 still requires body for compatibility.

session.description: Opaque Core-owned session/cookie-jar handle associated with the response.

redirects.description: Redirect hops observed by the host HTTP stack.

cookies.description: Cookie metadata observed or applied by the host HTTP stack.

HostHttpRequest.description: Host HTTP request descriptor emitted for remote-reading commands.

url.description: Absolute or host-resolvable URL to fetch. Must not be empty or whitespace-only.

method.description: HTTP method. Defaults to GET and must not be empty or whitespace-only.

charset.description: Optional response charset expectation or hint supplied by Core.

followRedirects.description: Whether the host may follow redirects for this request. Defaults are host-contract defined; hosts must not infer platform defaults.

maxRedirects.description: Maximum redirect hops the host may follow when followRedirects is true.

retry.description: Core-owned retry policy executed by the host transport.

usePlatformCookieJar.description: Whether the host may use its platform cookie jar. False keeps cookie state Core-owned.

session.description: Opaque Core-owned session/cookie-jar handle for this request.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of transport attempts including the first attempt.

backoffMillis.description: Optional base retry backoff in milliseconds.

id.description: Opaque session/cookie-jar identifier owned by Core.

HostCapability.description: Closed set of host-owned capabilities Core may request.

diagnostics.description: Optional host-owned execution diagnostics. Core adds operation correlation before surfacing the error.

HostErrorDiagnostics.description: Typed diagnostics for a failed host capability execution. Platforms report capability facts only and must not interpret Legado rules.

HostWebViewEvaluateJavaScriptRequest.description: Request params for webview.evaluateJavaScript. Core supplies document input and JavaScript; the host only evaluates the script in a platform WebView.

timeoutMillis.description: Optional execution timeout requested by Core.

HostWebViewEvaluateJavaScriptResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability webview.evaluateJavaScript.

value.description: Raw JSON value returned by host JavaScript evaluation.

finalUrl.description: Optional final WebView URL after loading.

title.description: Optional document title observed by the host.

HostFileReadRequest.description: Request params for file.read. Core supplies an opaque path and byte bounds; hosts only read bytes/content.

HostFileReadResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability file.read.

HostFileWriteRequest.description: Request params for file.write. Core supplies the destination path and bytes/content.

HostFileWriteResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability file.write.

HostCacheGetRequest.description: Request params for cache.get. Namespace and key are Core-owned opaque identifiers.

HostCacheGetResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability cache.get.

HostCachePutRequest.description: Request params for cache.put. Core supplies opaque namespace/key and bytes/content to store.

HostCachePutResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability cache.put.

HostCookieGetRequest.description: Request params for cookie.get. Core supplies lookup scope; host only returns cookie records.

HostCookieGetResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability cookie.get.

HostCookieSetRequest.description: Request params for cookie.set. Core supplies a cookie record; host only stores it for the scoped jar.

HostCookieSetResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability cookie.set.

HostLogEmitRequest.description: Request params for log.emit. Core supplies structured log facts; host only emits them.

HostLogEmitResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability log.emit.

HostTimeNowRequest.description: Request params for time.now. Core may request an optional clock/timezone fact.

HostTimeNowResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability time.now.

HostSystemInfoRequest.description: Request params for system.info. Keys are Core-owned opaque fact names.

HostSystemInfoResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability system.info.

HostPersistenceGetRequest.description: Request params for persistence.get. Namespace/key are Core-owned opaque identifiers.

HostPersistenceGetResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability persistence.get.

HostPersistencePutRequest.description: Request params for persistence.put. Core supplies opaque namespace/key and bytes/content to store.

HostPersistencePutResponse.description: Result payload accepted when completing a host.request with capability persistence.put.

RuntimeCancelParams.description: Parameters for runtime.cancel. Cancels an in-flight request by its requestId.

requestId.description: The requestId to cancel. Must differ from the runtime.cancel command's own requestId.

RuntimeStatusParams.description: Parameters for runtime.status. Must be an empty object.

RuntimeShutdownParams.description: Parameters for runtime.shutdown. Must be an empty object.

SourceImportParams.description: Parameters for source.import. Imports one remote-reading source definition into Core runtime state. Accepts either V1 canonical form (`name` + `rules`) or a raw Legado BookSource JSON payload. When `name` is omitted, Core derives it from `bookSource.bookSourceName` (Legado native source-name field). At least one of `name` or `bookSource.bookSourceName` must be present; runtime rejects otherwise.

sourceId.description: Stable source identifier. If omitted or blank, Core assigns one.

name.description: Human-readable source name. Optional: when omitted, Core falls back to `bookSource.bookSourceName`. If present, runtime validation rejects blank or whitespace-only values.

rules.description: Optional extraction rules object keyed by remote-reading stage.

bookSource.description: Optional raw Legado BookSource object preserved separately from V1 rules. When `name` is absent, `bookSource.bookSourceName` is used as the source name.

BookSearchParams.description: Parameters for book.search. Uses a prefetched response or emits http.execute via searchRequest.

sourceId.description: Source identifier used for storage lookup and result correlation.

searchRequest.description: Optional host HTTP request descriptor when searchResponse is empty.

source.description: Optional inline source definition used instead of storage lookup.

BookDetailParams.description: Parameters for book.detail. Merges fetched detail metadata into a base book.

sourceId.description: Source identifier used for storage lookup and result correlation.

book.description: Base book object to merge detail metadata into. Must contain at least bookId at runtime.

detailRequest.description: Optional host HTTP request descriptor when detailResponse is empty.

source.description: Optional inline source definition used instead of storage lookup.

BookTocParams.description: Parameters for book.toc. Extracts a table of contents for one book.

sourceId.description: Source identifier used for storage lookup and result correlation.

bookId.description: Book identifier whose table of contents is being fetched.

tocRequest.description: Optional host HTTP request descriptor when tocResponse is empty.

source.description: Optional inline source definition used instead of storage lookup.

ChapterContentParams.description: Parameters for chapter.content. Extracts chapter body content for one book chapter.

sourceId.description: Source identifier used for storage lookup and result correlation.

bookId.description: Book identifier whose chapter content is being fetched.

chapterTitle.description: Optional chapter title surfaced in the result and cache key.

chapterRequest.description: Optional host HTTP request descriptor when chapterResponse is empty.

jsRule.description: Optional JS rule script for chapter extraction.

source.description: Optional inline source definition used instead of storage lookup.

ReadingProgressUpdateParams.description: Parameters for reading.progress.update. Stores the current reading position for one book.

bookId.description: Book identifier whose reading progress is being updated.

chapterOffset.description: Character or byte offset inside the current chapter, depending on host reader mapping.

chapterProgress.description: Fractional progress reported by the host reader for the current chapter.

RssParseParams.description: Parameters for rss.parse. Parses an RSS/Atom XML feed into entries. Pure: no network.

feedUrl.description: Optional feed URL used to resolve relative links and self-reference guards.

xml.description: RSS/Atom XML feed text. Must be non-empty.

RssRefreshParams.description: Parameters for rss.refresh. Pure policy decision: should the subscription be polled now?

subscriptionId.description: Stable subscription identifier. Must be non-empty.

enabled.description: Whether the subscription is enabled for refresh.

updateIntervalMinutes.description: Minimum minutes between refreshes. Omitted means no interval bound.

lastFetchedAt.description: Unix-millis timestamp of the last successful fetch.

forceRefresh.description: Force a refresh decision regardless of interval.

evaluatedAt.description: Unix-millis timestamp at which the decision is evaluated.

SyncMergeParams.description: Parameters for sync.merge. Merges two snapshots with deterministic last-write-wins. Pure.

local.description: Local snapshot object (shape owned by reader_sync::SyncSnapshot).

remote.description: Remote snapshot object (shape owned by reader_sync::SyncSnapshot).

mergedSnapshotId.description: Optional stable id for the merged snapshot. Blank lets Core assign one.

mergedDeviceId.description: Optional device id for the merged snapshot.

mergedCreatedAt.description: Optional created-at timestamp for the merged snapshot.

SyncBackupParams.description: Parameters for sync.backup. Plans backup restore from a manifest. Pure planner.

package.description: Backup package object (shape owned by reader_sync::BackupPackage).

policy.description: Restore policy object (shape owned by reader_sync::RestorePolicy).

LocalBookParseParams.description: Parameters for local_book.parse. Parses a local TXT book into book + toc + chapters. Pure: no network.

bookId.description: Stable book identifier. Must be non-empty.

text.description: Already-decoded TXT content. Must be non-empty.

LocalBookCatalogParams.description: Parameters for local_book.catalog. Upserts a fingerprint catalog entry. Pure.

entry.description: Fingerprint catalog entry to upsert (shape owned by reader_local_book::LocalBookFingerprintCatalogEntry).

chapters.description: Chapter index entries to add (shape owned by reader_local_book::LocalBookChapterIndexEntry).

resources.description: Resource index entries to add (shape owned by reader_local_book::LocalBookResourceIndexEntry).

BookshelfListParams.description: Parameters for bookshelf.list. Pure read over the in-memory BookshelfStore; no host callback. Mirrors Legado BookDao.getAllBooks + group/keyword filter.

sourceId.description: Filter by source identifier (Legado origin). Omit for all sources.

bookId.description: Filter by source-relative book id (Legado bookUrl). Omit for all books.

group.description: Filter by user-defined group name (Legado group).

sortBy.description: Sort field. `manual` = sortIndex asc then addedAt desc.

BookshelfGetParams.description: Parameters for bookshelf.get. Looks up a single shelf entry by the composite (sourceId, bookId) key, mirroring Legado (origin, bookUrl).

TtsChapterRef.description: Reference to a chapter being spoken. Mirrors the remote-reading chapter identity so TTS can advance across the TOC without re-fetching.

sourceId.description: Source identifier that produced the chapter.

bookId.description: Book identifier the chapter belongs to.

chapterIndex.description: Zero-based chapter index within the book's TOC.

chapterTitle.description: Optional chapter title for UI display.

chapterUrl.description: Optional chapter URL for re-fetch / preload.

TtsSlicingStrategy.description: Strategy for slicing chapter text into speakable utterances.

TtsSlice.description: One speakable slice of chapter text produced by Core's slicer.

index.description: Zero-based index within the slice plan.

charStart.description: Half-open char range start in the original chapter content.

charEnd.description: Half-open char range end in the original chapter content.

paragraphIndex.description: Paragraph index in the source chapter for UI highlight sync.

TtsSlicePlan.description: Result of slicing one chapter's content into speakable utterances.

sourceCharCount.description: Total char count of the source chapter content.

TtsQueueState.description: High-level state of the TTS playback queue. Core tracks this; the host drives transitions.

TtsQueueSnapshot.description: Immutable snapshot of the queue at a point in time.

currentSliceIndex.description: Index of the current slice, or null if no plan is loaded.

totalSlices.description: Total slices in the loaded plan. 0 if Idle.

completedSlices.description: Number of slices in a terminal state (Done + Failed + Skipped).

sliceStatuses.description: Status of each slice, parallel to the plan's slices vector.

TtsQueueDrainBehavior.description: Behavior when the current chapter's queue drains.

next.description: Next chapter to preload. Null if current is the last chapter.

TtsSliceParams.description: Parameters for tts.slice. Core slices chapter content into speakable utterances.

TtsQueueStatusParams.description: Parameters for tts.queue.status. Core returns the current queue snapshot.

TtsChapterPlanParams.description: Parameters for tts.chapter.plan. Core returns the chapter transition plan.

TtsQueuePlayParams.description: Parameters for tts.queue.play. Loads a slice plan and starts playback. Valid from Idle/Stopped/Completed.

startSliceIndex.description: Zero-based slice index to start at. Must be < plan.slices.length.

TtsQueuePauseParams.description: Parameters for tts.queue.pause. Requires a loaded queue in Playing state.

TtsQueueResumeParams.description: Parameters for tts.queue.resume. Requires a loaded queue in Paused state.

TtsQueueStopParams.description: Parameters for tts.queue.stop. Requires a loaded, non-Idle queue.

TtsQueueNextParams.description: Parameters for tts.queue.next. Advances the cursor to the next slice; at the last slice enters Completed.

TtsQueuePrevParams.description: Parameters for tts.queue.prev. Moves the cursor to the previous slice; errors at the first slice.

ReplaceRuleData.description: Wire shape of a replace rule. Mirrors reader_domain::ReplaceRule (Legado ReplaceRule.kt).

ReplaceRuleCreateParams.description: Parameters for replace-rule.create. Optional id; Core assigns when omitted.

ReplaceRuleListParams.description: Parameters for replace-rule.list. All filters optional.

ReplaceRuleUpdateParams.description: Parameters for replace-rule.update. Partial update by id; all other fields optional.

ReplaceRuleDeleteParams.description: Parameters for replace-rule.delete. Idempotent: returns deleted=false when id not present.

SourceExploreKindsParams.description: Parameters for source.exploreKinds. Parses a source's exploreUrl field into discovery categories (Legado BookSourceExtensions.getExploreUrl). Pure: no network. Either source (inline) or sourceId must be present; exploreUrl overrides the source's field when provided.

SourceExploreParams.description: Parameters for source.explore. Three modes (mirrors book.search): (1) prefetched exploreResponse, (2) pre-built exploreRequest, (3) auto-build from url + source header. When exploreResponse is absent, Core emits http.execute and resumes on host.complete.

TxtTocRuleCreateParams.description: Parameters for txt-toc-rule.create. Mirrors Legado TxtTocRule.kt. When id is omitted, Core assigns a monotonically increasing id.

TxtTocRuleListParams.description: Parameters for txt-toc-rule.list. When enabledOnly=true, only enabled rules are returned.

TxtTocRuleUpdateParams.description: Parameters for txt-toc-rule.update. Partial update by id; omitted fields retain their existing values.

TxtTocRuleDeleteParams.description: Parameters for txt-toc-rule.delete. Idempotent: returns deleted=false when id not present.
